/usr/bin/c++ -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -DG4USE_STD11 -pthread -ftls-model=initial-exec -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -ftree-vectorize -fno-math-errno -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ReadHEPMC.dir/src/HepMCG4AsciiReader.cc.o
